title: Git-repository resource
description: Clone a single Git repository. Specify either an exact destination directory or a parent directory to clone into.

repository.description: Remote repository URL to clone from.

directory.description: Exact directory to clone into. Passed directly to git clone as the destination path.

parentDirectory.description: Parent directory to clone into. The folder name is derived from the repository URL using default git semantics.

autoVerifySSH.description: Automatically verifies the ssh connection for ssh git clones. Defaults to true.
